# ADR-NNNN: <Short title, decision-oriented, e.g. "Use X for Y">

| | |
|---|---|
| Status | Proposed / Accepted / Superseded by ADR-NNNN / Deprecated |
| Date | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Deciders | (names/roles) |

## Context

What is the problem? What forces (technical, business, team, timeline) are
at play? State this neutrally — don't pre-load the conclusion here.

## Decision

State the decision in one or two sentences, as a clear statement, not a
hedge ("We will use X.").

## Considered Alternatives

- **Option A** — what it is, why it was or wasn't chosen.
- **Option B** — what it is, why it was or wasn't chosen.
- **Option C** — what it is, why it was or wasn't chosen.

## Consequences

- Positive: what this decision makes easier.
- Negative / tradeoffs: what this decision makes harder or forecloses.
- Follow-up work this decision creates.

## Related

Links to other ADRs, design doc sections, or BDD features this touches.
